reviews.comment:
Estuve desayunando y la pasé muy bien.
Buen café con leche y ricos sacramentos.  La atención es cordial.
Los precios son accesibles y más barats que en otros cafés. Use la aplicación de YPF

(Translated by Google)
I had breakfast there and had a great time.
Good coffee with milk and delicious desserts. The service is friendly.
The prices are affordable and cheaper than other cafes. I used the YPF app.

reviews.comment:
Si te sobra el tiempo  carga en esta YPF, el ACÁ se desprestigia con tan mala atención el Playero le hizo un service al auto de adelante, que aceite, agua, vidrios… y luego le fue a inflar las ruedas. Demore 35 min en cargar. Teniendo 1 solo auto delante

(Translated by Google)
If you have time to spare, fill up at this YPF. ACÁ is discredited with such poor service. Playero serviced the car in front of me, including oil, water, windows... and then went to inflate the tires. It took me 35 minutes to fill up. There was only one car in front of me.

reviews.comment:
Muy lentos.Eramos pocos y actuaban como si los estában molestando.Fue el pre feriado del  2 de abril tipo 22.30/23 hs.Es la 1ra vez q me pasa en una ypf

(Translated by Google)
Very slow. There were only a few of us and they acted like they were being bothered. It was the day before the April 2nd holiday, around 10:30/11:00 PM. It's the first time this has happened to me at a YPF station.
